name: Joon Tiny Home Plan - 16x30 Modern Backyard ADU | DIY Tiny House Plans (480 Sq Ft)
open_features: Modern minimalist architecture designed for ADU use, compact lots, and flexible backyard living-now with added width for improved layout options.
Clean lines, standard framing, and an intuitive structure make Joon approachable for first-time builders and experienced DIYers alike.
Well-placed doors and balanced windows maximize natural light, cross-ventilation, and seamless indoor-outdoor flow.
Horizontal wood siding, sleek trim, and a single-pitch lean-to roof create a modern-rustic aesthetic with lasting curb appeal.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Joon Tiny Home - a spacious 16x30 modern living and working space designed for comfort, efficiency, and clean architectural simplicity. With its expanded width and smart proportions, Joon offers enhanced interior flexibility while maintaining a sleek, contemporary footprint ideal for backyard ADUs and modern outdoor living.
